title: Magical Crispy Moroccan Sea Bass Briouat
description: A sour and crispy Moroccan dish featuring sea bass fillets, this ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly recipe is perfect for a dinner meal, with a flavorful braise and wrapped in a briouat form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped onion, parsley, and cilantro to the bowl and mix well.
Place a sea bass fillet in the center of a piece of parchment paper, brush with the lemon juice mixture, and fold the paper to form a briouat shape.
Repeat the process with the remaining sea bass fillets.
Place the briouats on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the briouats from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
